title: Snappy Buttery Ethiopian Injera Fir Fir
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Ethiopian dish featuring parmesan cheese and a char-grill flavor, served in a festive fir-fir form
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1/4 cup of melted butter over medium heat
Add the diced red onion and cook until translucent
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the torn injera bread and stir to combine with the onion and garlic mixture
In a small bowl, mix together the grated parmesan cheese, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper
Add the cheese mixture to the skillet and stir to combine
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture is heated through and starting to brown
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the remaining 1/4 cup of melted butter
Serve the fir-fir hot, garnished with additional grated parmesan cheese if desired
